channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Outside number 7, 3rd June
item.description:
Paint spill has been there for weeks really needs to be cleaned

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kenilworth Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish still all over the bus stop desite me reortong on Monday, 3rd June
item.description:
I sent a report Monday and received a notification saying it would be cleared ASAP. Children walk past to school. This is a health hazard as nappies are on the floor. It is disgusting.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Torridon Road, Catford South, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Van with no front number plate parked on kerb and double yellow lines, 3rd June
item.description:
Van illegally parked with no front number plate also on kerb

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Vanbrugh Terrace, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Primrose Hill Road outside St Paul’s school by broken street light number 14, 3rd June
item.description:
Pelican crossing light not working outside St Paul’s school Primrose Hill NW3 next to street light number 14 (already reported) which is also not working
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elsworthy Road, Belsize Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Clean our block, 3rd June
item.description:
Keynes court 5th floor Floor has not been cleaned all week Funny how we have to point out what the caretaker does not do in order to get things done, may be I will find some more work for him next week IT WOULD BE NICE TO HAVE WORK DONE WHAT WE PAY FOR WITH OUT REPORTING IT

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Attlee Road, Thamesmead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 23 Stratford Villas, 3rd June
item.description:
Tree trunk loose in ground and moving within existing stakes. Tree is listing into road at 45 degree angle, overhanging cars. Needs properly restaking (it has been restaked in the last year, and has a new water bag, but the staking has never stopped the tree trunk movement - or restored the trunk to the vertical - and the stake ties - already broken and retied- have now slipped from the stakes) please
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 19, Stratford Villas, Kentish Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocking path to car park, 3rd June
item.description:
No licence plate on the front and my car almost could not exit the carpark

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bostall Lane, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pallets left on street next door to 90 Melbourne Grove, 3rd June
item.description:
These have been there a while. I believe they were left there after stuff was removed from one of the flats

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 94, Melbourne Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti and dirty play area, 3rd June
item.description:
Graffiti on play equipment And a very dirty new play park Needs cleaning properly then washing down

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lytton Strachey Path, Thamesmead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Opposite postbox on Acol Road near corner with Priory Road, 3rd June
item.description:
Light no. 1 not working
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 65, Priory Road, South Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two car booster seats, set of drawers and home waste has been left outside the entrance (green gate) to our residential area., 3rd June
item.description:
There have been two car booster seats left for 2-3 weeks outside our electronic gate. Now there is a set of drawers and some domestic items (lampshade, duvet, cushions) as well.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 53, North Cross Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drain cover missing, 3rd June
item.description:
Drain cover missing on footpath This has been missing for a couple of weeks after your team cut the grass and damaged the wood cover that was in place now it's a hazard to health as children walk the path and dogs SURPRISED NO ONE HAS REPORTED THIS ? ESPECIALLY YOUR STAFF and street lighting needs looking at public realm officer should investigate

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Marshall Path, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Full yellow street bin, 3rd June
item.description:
The yellow street bin is full with black bag placed next to it. Can this please be cleared and emptied. Thank you
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wadeville Close, Lessness Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped, 3rd June
item.description:
Watched the occupant of this house dump the rubbish here as I was walking past.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kemsing Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped rubbish and tv, 3rd June
item.description:
Flytipped rubbish and tv

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Warepoint Drive, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Furniture flytipped, 3rd June
item.description:
Furniture flytipped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Warepoint Drive, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Garden waste blocking footpath, 3rd June
item.description:
Someone has cut their bushes and just left it on the pavement. As you do

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rancliffe Gardens, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumping Rubbish on council owned land, 3rd June
item.description:
They are having building work done and they are using the area to store waste and materials. It's really not fair on the residents because this isn't the first time they've done this.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Denton Road, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Garden waste/renovation waste, 3rd June
item.description:
On large grass verge area. Neighbour adajcent is using this area to either store/flytip waste from their garden during renovations without a permit or skip. Unclear when waste will be removed. Grass verge is usually well maintained by another neighhbour and council workers.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Keston Close, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhanging tree branches causing unacceptable damage and risk to our property, 3rd June
item.description:
I am writing to report an issue concerning trees located in the park adjacent to our property. Branches from these trees are extending over the boundary fence and are now in contact with our property, including our glass balcony. The branches are repeatedly striking the structure, particularly in windy conditions, and are causing ongoing and unacceptable damage. This situation is becoming a risk to our property, and we kindly request that the council arrange for the necessary pruning of the overhanging branches as soon as possible to prevent further damage. We are happy to provide videos of this.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Radial Path, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
